user.title: Energy Dispatcher
user.description: Connect your energy sensors and set price thresholds. Add loads afterwards from the integration page.

data_description.price_sensor: Sensor with current and upcoming spot prices (today and tomorrow when available). Examples: Nord Pool, Tibber, Amber.
data_description.grid_input_sensor: Instantaneous power drawn from the grid in watts (W). Used for power guard and import tracking.
data_description.grid_output_sensor: Instantaneous power exported to the grid in watts (W). When above zero, self-consumption (SOLAR mode) may be recommended.
data_description.export_price_offset: Fixed compensation added to the current spot price to estimate export revenue per kWh. Example: if spot is 0.50 and compensation is 0.20, export price is 0.70. Same unit as your price sensor.
data_description.power_guard_strategy: Optional protection against high grid import. Disabled = no limit. Simple threshold = max kWh per clock hour.
data_description.power_guard_hourly_limit_kwh: Maximum grid import energy allowed per clock hour when power guard is enabled. Example: 2.0 = 2 kWh/h.
data_description.price_free_threshold: Spot prices at or below this absolute value are treated as free grid (GRID_FREE). Same unit as your price sensor.
data_description.price_cheap_ratio: Spot price below this fraction of the rolling weekly average is cheap grid (GRID_CHEAP). Example: 0.30 = 30 % of average.
data_description.price_expensive_ratio: Spot price above this fraction of the rolling weekly average is expensive grid (GRID_EXPENSIVE). Example: 1.50 = 150 % of average.

user.title: Add load
user.description: Define a controllable energy consumer and which energy sources it may use.

data_description.name: Display name for this load. Becomes the entity id, e.g. energy_dispatcher.dehumidifier.
data_description.required_power: Power the load needs to run, in watts (W). Used for export and self-consumption checks.
data_description.solar_enabled: When enabled, recommend ON (SOLAR) while power is being exported to the grid and export price is below the threshold.
data_description.solar_max_export_price: Prefer self-consumption only when estimated export price is below this fixed level. Same unit as your price sensor. Leave empty to ignore export price.
data_description.minimum_minutes_per_day: Minimum ON minutes required per calendar day. Missing minutes are scheduled on the cheapest allowed hours. Leave empty for no daily requirement.
data_description.minimum_minutes_per_week: Minimum ON minutes required per ISO week. Leave empty for no weekly requirement.
data_description.grid_free_enabled: Allow running when spot price is at or below the free grid threshold.
data_description.grid_cheap_enabled: Allow running when spot price is below the cheap grid ratio.
data_description.grid_normal_enabled: Allow running when spot price is within the normal range.
data_description.grid_expensive_enabled: Allow running when spot price is above the expensive grid ratio.

reconfigure.title: Configure load
reconfigure.description: Update settings for this controllable load.

data_description.name: Display name for this load. Becomes the entity id, e.g. energy_dispatcher.dehumidifier.
data_description.required_power: Power the load needs to run, in watts (W). Used for export and self-consumption checks.
data_description.solar_enabled: When enabled, recommend ON (SOLAR) while power is being exported to the grid and export price is below the threshold.
data_description.solar_max_export_price: Prefer self-consumption only when estimated export price is below this fixed level. Same unit as your price sensor. Leave empty to ignore export price.
data_description.minimum_minutes_per_day: Minimum ON minutes required per calendar day. Missing minutes are scheduled on the cheapest allowed hours. Leave empty for no daily requirement.
data_description.minimum_minutes_per_week: Minimum ON minutes required per ISO week. Leave empty for no weekly requirement.
data_description.grid_free_enabled: Allow running when spot price is at or below the free grid threshold.
data_description.grid_cheap_enabled: Allow running when spot price is below the cheap grid ratio.
data_description.grid_normal_enabled: Allow running when spot price is within the normal range.
data_description.grid_expensive_enabled: Allow running when spot price is above the expensive grid ratio.

error.load_exists: A load with this name already exists.
